example: The audience began to clap enthusiastically after the wonderful performance.
exampleZh: 精彩表演结束后，观众开始热情鼓掌。

example: They took out a mortgage to buy their first house last year.
exampleZh: 他们去年办了抵押贷款买下了他们的第一套房子。

example: The political scandal shocked the entire nation and led to the resignation.
exampleZh: 这起政治丑闻震惊了全国，并导致部长辞职。

zh: 免疫的；不受影响的；免除的
example: A healthy diet can help strengthen your immune system naturally.
exampleZh: 健康的饮食有助于自然地增强你的免疫系统。

example: He quickly scanned the newspaper headlines while waiting for the bus.
exampleZh: 他在等公交车时快速浏览了报纸的头条新闻。

example: I only had time to skim the report before the important meeting.
exampleZh: 在重要会议之前，我只有时间略读这份报告。

example: She gave him an angry glare when he interrupted her speech rudely.
exampleZh: 当他粗鲁地打断她的发言时，她愤怒地瞪了他一眼。

zh: 一瞥；匆匆一看；隐约的感觉
example: I caught a brief glimpse of the celebrity as she entered the hotel lobby.
exampleZh: 当那位名人进入酒店大堂时，我匆匆瞥见她一眼。

example: He glanced at his watch and realized he was already late for work.
exampleZh: 他瞥了一眼手表，意识到上班已经迟到了。

example: She sat by the window and gazed at the stars in the night sky.
exampleZh: 她坐在窗边，凝视着夜空中的星星。

example: The curious child tried to peep through the keyhole into the locked room.
exampleZh: 那个好奇的孩子试图透过钥匙孔偷看锁着的房间。

example: I like to browse the shelves of bookstores without any particular plan.
exampleZh: 我喜欢漫无目的地在书店的书架间浏览。

example: It is impolite to stare at strangers for a long time in public.
exampleZh: 在公共场合长时间盯着陌生人看是不礼貌的。

example: The crude oil must be processed at a refinery before it can be used.
exampleZh: 原油必须经过炼油厂加工后才能使用。

example: Scientists are still trying to determine the origin of this mysterious virus.
exampleZh: 科学家们仍在试图确定这种神秘病毒的起源。

example: Most of his problems stem from a lack of proper communication with others.
exampleZh: 他的大部分问题源于与他人缺乏适当的沟通。

example: The mother gently rocked the cradle until the baby fell asleep peacefully.
exampleZh: 母亲轻轻摇动摇篮，直到婴儿安然入睡。

example: This region is famous for its beautiful mountains and traditional cuisine.
exampleZh: 这个地区以其美丽的山脉和传统美食而闻名。

example: We need to find a reliable source of information before writing the article.
exampleZh: 在写文章之前，我们需要找到一个可靠的信息来源。

example: Water is a precious natural resource that we must all learn to conserve.
exampleZh: 水是一种宝贵的自然资源，我们都必须学会节约。

example: His parents hired a private tutor to help him improve his math grades.
exampleZh: 他的父母请了一位私人家教帮他提高数学成绩。

example: The tuition fees at private universities have increased dramatically in recent years.
exampleZh: 近年来私立大学的学费大幅上涨。

example: She had a strange notion that everyone was secretly watching her every move.
exampleZh: 她有一个奇怪的想法，认为每个人都在暗中监视她的一举一动。

example: Temperatures are expected to plunge below freezing by tomorrow morning.
exampleZh: 预计到明天早上气温将骤降至冰点以下。

example: Proper nutrition is essential for the healthy growth of young children.
exampleZh: 适当的营养对幼儿的健康成长至关重要。

example: It is important to nurture a child's natural curiosity and creativity.
exampleZh: 培养孩子天生的好奇心和创造力很重要。

example: Establishing a daily routine can help you become more productive and organized.
exampleZh: 建立日常习惯可以帮助你更有条理、更高效。

example: The diagram shows the basic schema of the entire network system.
exampleZh: 该图表展示了整个网络系统的基本架构。

example: She is always punctual for appointments, never once arriving late.
exampleZh: 她赴约总是很准时，从未迟到过一次。

example: The war brought nothing but misery to the innocent people of the region.
exampleZh: 战争给该地区无辜的人民带来的只有痛苦。

example: A good education can nourish a child's mind and prepare them for the future.
exampleZh: 良好的教育可以滋养孩子的心灵，为他们的未来做好准备。

example: The police uncovered a scheme to steal valuable paintings from the museum.
exampleZh: 警方发现了一个从博物馆盗窃名画的阴谋。

zh: 论坛；讨论会；公共集会场所
example: The online forum allows users to discuss various topics and share ideas freely.
exampleZh: 这个在线论坛允许用户自由讨论各种话题并分享想法。

example: More haste, less speed — take your time and do the job properly.
exampleZh: 欲速则不达——慢慢来，把工作做好。

example: He has always been keen on learning about different cultures from around the world.
exampleZh: 他一直热衷于了解世界各地的不同文化。

example: You should never eat raw meat because it may contain harmful bacteria.
exampleZh: 你绝不应该吃生肉，因为它可能含有有害细菌。

example: The first item on the agenda is the annual budget review for next year.
exampleZh: 议程上的第一项是明年的年度预算审查。

example: I have a very busy schedule today with back-to-back meetings all afternoon.
exampleZh: 我今天的日程很满，整个下午会议一个接一个。

example: The law obliges all citizens to pay taxes on their annual income.
exampleZh: 法律要求所有公民为其年收入纳税。

example: A loyal friend will always stand by your side no matter what happens.
exampleZh: 忠诚的朋友无论发生什么都会站在你身边。

example: The dog remained faithful to its owner until the very end of its life.
exampleZh: 那条狗直到生命的尽头都对主人忠心耿耿。

example: The royal family attended the grand opening of the new national museum.
exampleZh: 王室成员出席了新国家博物馆的盛大开幕式。

example: The well-trained dog was very obedient and always followed his commands.
exampleZh: 那只训练有素的狗非常听话，总是服从他的命令。

example: Winning the championship after years of hard work was a true triumph for the team.
exampleZh: 经过多年努力赢得冠军对这支队伍来说是真正的胜利。

example: The school aims to integrate students from different cultural backgrounds successfully.
exampleZh: 学校旨在成功地融合来自不同文化背景的学生。

example: It is illegal to segregate people based on their race or religion in most countries.
exampleZh: 在大多数国家，根据种族或宗教隔离他人是非法的。

example: Teaching young children requires a great deal of patience and understanding.
exampleZh: 教小孩子需要极大的耐心和理解。

example: You should walk at a comfortable pace rather than trying to rush ahead.
exampleZh: 你应该以舒适的速度行走，而不是急着往前冲。

zh: 专利；专利权；专利的；明显的
example: He filed a patent for his new invention to protect his intellectual property.
exampleZh: 他为他的新发明申请了专利以保护知识产权。

example: Thomas Edison is famous for helping to invent the practical electric light bulb.
exampleZh: 托马斯·爱迪生因帮助发明实用的电灯泡而闻名。

example: He began to stride confidently across the stage to deliver his speech.
exampleZh: 他开始自信地大步走过舞台发表演讲。

example: A swarm of bees gathered around the hive in the warm spring sunshine.
exampleZh: 在温暖的春日阳光下，一群蜜蜂聚集在蜂巢周围。

example: The smell of fresh coffee lingered in the kitchen for a long time.
exampleZh: 新鲜咖啡的香味在厨房里久久萦绕。

example: We spent the afternoon wandering through the narrow streets of the old town.
exampleZh: 我们花了一下午在老城区狭窄的街道上漫步。

example: They took a leisurely stroll along the beach as the sun slowly set.
exampleZh: 日落时分，他们沿着海滩悠闲地散步。

example: I decided to enrol in an online course to improve my programming skills.
exampleZh: 我决定报名参加一个在线课程来提高我的编程技能。

example: The company is trying to recruit more experienced engineers for the new project.
exampleZh: 公司正在为新项目招募更多有经验的工程师。

example: He had to drag his heavy suitcase up three flights of stairs.
exampleZh: 他不得不拖着沉重的行李箱爬上三层楼梯。

example: The couple had a bitter quarrel over money problems last night.
exampleZh: 那对夫妇昨晚因金钱问题发生了激烈的争吵。

zh: 君主；最高统治者；主权的
example: Every nation has the sovereign right to govern its own internal affairs.
exampleZh: 每个国家都拥有管理本国内政的主权权利。

example: The network connection began to lag during the important video conference call.
exampleZh: 网络连接在重要的视频会议通话期间开始出现延迟。

example: The workers began to agitate for better wages and improved working conditions.
exampleZh: 工人们开始鼓动要求提高工资和改善工作条件。

example: You should not always blame others for your own mistakes and failures.
exampleZh: 你不应该总是把自己的错误和失败归咎于他人。

example: The king's reign was remembered as a period of peace and great prosperity.
exampleZh: 这位国王的统治时期被人们铭记为和平与繁荣的时代。

example: Remember to attach a price tag to each item before putting it on display.
exampleZh: 记得在每件商品上贴价格标签再陈列出来。

example: You should always read the label on food products before buying them.
exampleZh: 购买食品前你应该始终阅读产品上的标签。

zh: 跛的；瘸的；蹩脚的；站不住脚的
example: He gave a rather lame excuse for not finishing his assignment on time.
exampleZh: 他为自己没有按时完成作业找了一个相当蹩脚的借口。

example: The snow began to melt as the warm spring sun finally came out.
exampleZh: 随着温暖的春日终于出现，雪开始融化了。

zh: 驯服的；温顺的；驯服；制服
example: The lion in the circus appeared surprisingly tame and well-trained.
exampleZh: 马戏团里的狮子出奇地温顺，训练有素。

example: A lack of funding may hinder the progress of this important research project.
exampleZh: 缺乏资金可能会阻碍这个重要研究项目的进展。

example: Bad weather conditions continued to hamper rescue efforts in the disaster area.
exampleZh: 恶劣的天气条件继续阻碍灾区的救援工作。

example: Pilots use flight simulators to simulate emergency situations during their training.
exampleZh: 飞行员在训练中使用飞行模拟器来模拟紧急情况。

example: Good teachers know how to stimulate their students' interest in learning new things.
exampleZh: 好老师知道如何激发学生学习新事物的兴趣。

zh: 同时的；同步的；同时发生的
example: The two explosions were almost simultaneous, occurring within seconds of each other.
exampleZh: 两次爆炸几乎是同时发生的，彼此相隔仅几秒钟。

example: We need to find new ways to engage young people in community service.
exampleZh: 我们需要找到新方法让年轻人参与社区服务。

example: Seeking counseling can help couples resolve their marital problems and conflicts.
exampleZh: 寻求咨询可以帮助夫妻解决婚姻问题和冲突。

example: She was three months pregnant when she first heard the wonderful news.
exampleZh: 当她第一次听到那个好消息时，已经怀孕三个月了。

example: The divorce rate has been rising steadily in many countries around the world.
exampleZh: 世界上许多国家的离婚率一直在稳步上升。

example: You should always discuss major financial decisions with your spouse beforehand.
exampleZh: 做重大财务决定前，你应该先与你的配偶商量。

zh: 家庭；一家人；家庭的；家喻户晓的
example: The average household in this city spends about thirty percent of income on housing.
exampleZh: 这个城市的普通家庭大约将收入的30%花在住房上。

example: Judges have a duty to uphold the law and deliver fair justice to all.
exampleZh: 法官有责任维护法律，公正对待所有人。

example: The workers used a crane to hoist the heavy equipment onto the roof.
exampleZh: 工人们用起重机将重型设备吊到屋顶上。

zh: 理智的；心智健全的；合情合理的
example: No sane person would drive a car without wearing a seatbelt these days.
exampleZh: 如今，没有一个理智的人会不系安全带开车。

example: The Renaissance was a period of great cultural and artistic achievement in Europe.
exampleZh: 文艺复兴是欧洲文化和艺术成就辉煌的时期。

example: As the only son, he is the legal heir to his father's vast fortune.
exampleZh: 作为独生子，他是他父亲巨额财产的合法继承人。

example: It is our duty and responsibility to preserve our cultural heritage for future generations.
exampleZh: 为后代保护我们的文化遗产是我们的责任和义务。

example: She will inherit the family business after her father retires next year.
exampleZh: 父亲明年退休后，她将继承家族企业。

example: There are certain risks inherent in every kind of investment you make.
exampleZh: 你做的每一种投资都存在某些固有的风险。

example: The magician's final trick never fails to astonish audiences around the world.
exampleZh: 魔术师的最后一个魔术总是让世界各地的观众惊叹不已。

example: We have absolute confidence in her ability to lead the team to success.
exampleZh: 我们有绝对的信心，相信她能带领团队取得成功。

example: The charity launched a campaign to appeal for donations to help the flood victims.
exampleZh: 慈善机构发起了一项活动，呼吁捐款帮助洪水灾民。

zh: 起诉；控告；检举；继续从事
example: The district attorney decided to prosecute the suspect for first-degree murder.
exampleZh: 地方检察官决定以一级谋杀罪起诉嫌疑人。

example: I felt flattered when my boss praised my work in front of the whole team.
exampleZh: 当老板在全队面前表扬我的工作时，我感到很受宠若惊。

example: The wind began to scatter the fallen leaves across the entire garden.
exampleZh: 风开始把落叶吹散到整个花园。

example: You can browse the library catalog to find the books you need quickly.
exampleZh: 你可以浏览图书馆目录以快速找到你需要的书。

example: The delicious smell from the kitchen really gave me a healthy appetite.
exampleZh: 厨房飘来的美味香气让我胃口大开。

example: The recent crisis provided a strong impetus for reform in the entire industry.
exampleZh: 最近的危机为整个行业的改革提供了强大的推动力。

example: During the war, the two countries became close allies against a common enemy.
exampleZh: 战争期间，两国成为对抗共同敌人的亲密盟友。

example: You can always rely on her to keep her promises and meet deadlines on time.
exampleZh: 你始终可以信赖她遵守承诺并按时完成任务。

zh: 有责任的；有义务的；易……的
example: The company is liable for any damage caused by its defective products sold.
exampleZh: 公司对其销售的缺陷产品造成的任何损害负有责任。

example: It is completely absurd to think that money can buy you true happiness.
exampleZh: 认为金钱能买到真正的幸福完全是荒谬的。

example: Let us look at the problem from a completely different angle before deciding.
exampleZh: 在做决定之前，让我们从一个完全不同的角度来看这个问题。

example: He believed that the ancient curse had brought misfortune to his whole family.
exampleZh: 他相信那个古老的诅咒给他的整个家庭带来了不幸。

example: You should not accuse anyone without first having solid evidence to support your claim.
exampleZh: 在没有确凿证据之前，你不应该指责任何人。

example: I absolutely adore spending quiet weekends reading books at home with my cat.
exampleZh: 我非常喜欢在家里和我的猫一起安静地读书度过周末。

zh: 容纳；提供住宿；适应；满足
example: The new stadium can accommodate up to eighty thousand spectators for major events.
exampleZh: 新体育场可容纳多达八万名观众观看大型赛事。

example: All passengers must be aboard the plane at least thirty minutes before departure.
exampleZh: 所有乘客必须在起飞前至少三十分钟登机。

example: You should avail yourself of every opportunity to improve your professional skills.
exampleZh: 你应该利用一切机会提高你的专业技能。

example: Over the years, he managed to accumulate a vast collection of rare stamps.
exampleZh: 多年来，他设法积累了大量稀有邮票的收藏。

zh: 警觉的；使警觉；警报；警戒
example: The security guard remained alert throughout the night to ensure everyone's safety.
exampleZh: 保安整夜保持警觉以确保每个人的安全。

example: Many companies use social media platforms to advertise their new products these days.
exampleZh: 如今许多公司利用社交媒体平台来宣传他们的新产品。

zh: 警报；闹钟；使惊慌；使担心
example: The fire alarm went off in the middle of the night, waking everyone up.
exampleZh: 火警在半夜响起，把所有人都吵醒了。

example: Be careful not to slip on the wet floor because it is very slippery right now.
exampleZh: 小心不要在湿地板上滑倒，现在非常滑。

zh: 极好的；绝妙的；神话般的
example: We had a fabulous time at the beach, swimming and playing in the sun.
exampleZh: 我们在海滩上度过了美好的时光，在阳光下游泳玩耍。

zh: 壮观的；令人惊叹的；引人注目的
example: The fireworks display on New Year's Eve was absolutely spectacular and breathtaking.
exampleZh: 除夕夜的烟花表演壮观得令人叹为观止。

example: The rent for this apartment is quite affordable compared to other places in the city.
exampleZh: 与市内其他地方相比，这间公寓的租金相当实惠。

example: We signed a two-year lease for the commercial office space downtown.
exampleZh: 我们为市中心的商业办公空间签了两年租约。

zh: 杰出的；明亮的；才华横溢的
example: She came up with a brilliant solution to the complex problem we faced.
exampleZh: 她为我们面临的复杂问题想出了一个绝妙的解决方案。

zh: 极好的；了不起的；非常的
example: You did a terrific job organizing the entire event; everything went perfectly.
exampleZh: 你组织整个活动做得非常好，一切进展顺利。

example: The candidates must go through a rigorous selection process before being accepted.
exampleZh: 候选人必须经过严格的筛选过程才能被录取。

example: The old regime was overthrown after months of widespread protests and demonstrations.
exampleZh: 经过数月的广泛抗议和示威，旧政权被推翻了。

example: The trees stood bare against the gray winter sky without any leaves.
exampleZh: 光秃秃的树木在灰蒙蒙的冬日天空下矗立着。

example: Nothing much can grow on this barren land without proper irrigation and care.
exampleZh: 没有适当的灌溉和照料，这片贫瘠的土地上长不出什么东西。

example: She leaned against the wall for support as she felt a bit dizzy.
exampleZh: 她靠在墙上寻求支撑，因为她感到有些头晕。

example: She managed to rear three successful children while working a full-time job.
exampleZh: 她在全职工作的同时成功抚养了三个孩子长大。

example: The future looked bleak for the company after its biggest client canceled the contract.
exampleZh: 在最大客户取消合同后，公司的前景看起来很黯淡。

example: I did not mean to embarrass you in front of your friends; I am very sorry.
exampleZh: 我不是故意在你朋友面前让你难堪，非常抱歉。

example: You should never insult someone based on their appearance, background, or beliefs.
exampleZh: 你绝不应该因他人的外貌、背景或信仰而侮辱他们。

example: If you lose your passport abroad, you should contact your embassy immediately.
exampleZh: 如果你在国外丢失了护照，应立即联系你的大使馆。

example: The senator delivered a passionate speech about the need for better healthcare.
exampleZh: 参议员就改善医疗保健的必要性发表了慷慨激昂的演讲。

example: It would be prudent to save some money for unexpected emergencies in the future.
exampleZh: 为将来可能发生的意外紧急情况存一些钱是明智之举。

zh: 准确的；精确的；正确无误的
example: The weather forecast proved to be remarkably accurate for the entire week.
exampleZh: 事实证明，天气预报在整个星期都非常准确。

example: The view from the top of the mountain was absolutely magnificent and unforgettable.
exampleZh: 从山顶看到的景色壮丽无比，令人难忘。

zh: 了不起的；非凡的；令人惊奇的
example: The chef prepared a marvelous dinner that impressed all the invited guests.
exampleZh: 厨师准备了一顿出色的晚餐，给所有受邀客人留下了深刻印象。

example: Can you give me an approximate number of people who will attend the event?
exampleZh: 你能告诉我大约有多少人会参加这个活动吗？

example: You can use a microscope to magnify tiny objects that are invisible to the naked eye.
exampleZh: 你可以用显微镜放大肉眼看不见的微小物体。

example: Language is often the biggest barrier for people who move to a new country.
exampleZh: 语言往往是搬到新国家的人们面临的最大障碍。

example: You should consult a doctor if the symptoms continue for more than a week.
exampleZh: 如果症状持续一周以上，你应该咨询医生。

zh: 便宜货；买卖；讨价还价；议价
example: I found this beautiful dress at a real bargain price during the sale.
exampleZh: 我在打折期间以非常划算的价格买到了这条漂亮的裙子。

example: She made a positive comment about my presentation, which made me feel proud.
exampleZh: 她对我的演讲做了积极的评价，这让我感到很自豪。

zh: 下属的；次要的；下属；下级
example: A good manager always listens to the opinions of his subordinates with respect.
exampleZh: 一个好的管理者总是尊重地听取下属的意见。

example: You should exercise extreme caution when walking alone at night in unfamiliar areas.
exampleZh: 在不熟悉的地方夜间独自行走时，你应该格外小心。

example: As a safety precaution, please wear your seatbelt at all times in the car.
exampleZh: 作为安全预防措施，请在车内始终系好安全带。

zh: 当前的；现在的；水流；电流
example: The current situation requires us to make a quick and well-informed decision.
exampleZh: 当前形势要求我们做出快速而明智的决定。

example: We need to coordinate our schedules to find a time that works for everyone.
exampleZh: 我们需要协调我们的日程，以找到一个对所有人都合适的时间。

example: They had to cancel the outdoor concert due to the sudden thunderstorm warning.
exampleZh: 由于突如其来的雷暴预警，他们不得不取消户外音乐会。

zh: 安慰；慰问；控制台；操纵台
example: She tried her best to console her friend after the unexpected bad news arrived.
exampleZh: 在意外坏消息传来后，她尽力安慰她的朋友。

zh: 劝告；商议；法律顾问；建议
example: He sought legal counsel before making any decisions about the complicated contract.
exampleZh: 在对那份复杂的合同做出任何决定之前，他寻求了法律咨询。

zh: 使眼花缭乱；使倾倒；使赞叹
example: The bright stage lights seemed to dazzle the performer as she walked on stage.
exampleZh: 当她走上舞台时，明亮的舞台灯光似乎让她眼花缭乱。

example: The small village has a unique charm that attracts tourists from all over the world.
exampleZh: 这个小村庄有一种独特的魅力，吸引着来自世界各地的游客。
